name: t13-merge-intervals
prompt: The test suite references App.IntervalMerger.Merge(string intervals), which isn't implemented yet, so the build currently fails. Create src/App/IntervalMerger.cs with `public static string Merge(string intervals)` so the whole test suite passes. The input is a comma-separated list of integer ranges like "1-3,2-6,8-10"; parse them, merge any that OVERLAP OR TOUCH (e.g. "1-3,3-5" -> "1-5", but "1-2,3-4" stays separate because there's a gap between 2 and 3), sort the result by start, and return it in the same "start-end,start-end" format. Input order is arbitrary. An empty string returns an empty string. Do not modify the existing tests.
